headline: Toxic chemical safely removed from ETH Zurich after 250 evacuated
summary: A hazardous chemical prompted evacuation of 250 people near ETH Zurich and was transported away without injury.

headline: Iran war fertilizer disruption squeezes Swiss farmers
summary: Blocked trade routes from the Iran war push fertilizer prices a third higher for a Basel-Landschaft farmer.

headline: Service civil reform splits Switzerland ahead of vote
summary: Swiss debate over civilian-service reform that would funnel conscientious objectors back toward the army.

headline: State Secretariat for Migration to cut 108 posts
summary: Swiss SEM announces elimination of 108 mostly temporary positions in early 2027 as asylum numbers fall.

headline: Federal prosecutor demands reform of phone-data sealing after Winterthur knife attack
summary: Swiss Attorney General Blaettler calls for reform of evidence-sealing rules that block access to attacker phone data.

headline: Russian drone hits spent-fuel storage building near Chernobyl
summary: A Russian Shahed drone struck a building at the Chernobyl centralized spent-fuel storage facility; radiation stable.

headline: Iran war hits 100 days; Israel strikes Beirut, Trump refuses to unfreeze assets
summary: On day 100 of the Iran war Israel struck Beirut suburbs and Trump said he will not unfreeze Iranian assets before a ceasefire.

headline: Egypt hosts renewed Gaza ceasefire talks as Israel kills nine
summary: Hamas meets Egyptian, Qatari and Turkish mediators in Cairo while Israeli strikes kill nine in Gaza.

headline: Peru votes in Fujimori-Sanchez presidential runoff
summary: Polls open in Peru's presidential runoff between Keiko Fujimori and leftist Roberto Sanchez.

headline: Nigerian army frees 360 abducted by Boko Haram in Borno
summary: Nigeria's army freed 360 people abducted by Boko Haram after clashes in Borno State.

headline: Austria tries Syrian ex-general 'general of torture'
summary: A rare universal-jurisdiction trial of two former Syrian officials including a feared general opens in Vienna.

headline: ComoDoS: remote single-packet kernel BSOD in Comodo Internet Security firewall
summary: CVE-2026-49494 IPv6 integer underflow in Comodo Inspect.sys lets a remote unauthenticated attacker BSOD Windows with one packet.

headline: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager zero-day exploited for root, no patch
summary: CVE-2026-20245 in Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager exploited in the wild for root command execution with no patch available.

headline: GL.iNet GL-MT3000 routers hit by command-injection cluster
summary: Multiple command-injection CVEs disclosed in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 travel routers across LuCI, FTP and DLNA components.

headline: FBI warns of FIFA World Cup 2026 fraud wave
summary: FBI and Group-IB warn of 4,300+ fake FIFA domains, banking malware and ticket fraud ahead of the World Cup.
